label: VK (VKontakte)
description: Full VK integration for OpenClaw: messaging, wall posts, market/shop, media upload, stories, community management, polls, likes, widgets

token.description: VK Community Bot API token (from dev.vk.com -> community -> manage -> API)

dmPolicy.description: Who can message the bot: open=anyone, pairing=approve first, allowlist=only listed IDs

allowFrom.description: Allowed VK user IDs (used with allowlist/pairing policies)

longPollWait.description: Long Poll wait timeout in seconds (1-90)

groqApiKey.description: Groq API key for voice message transcription via Whisper (free tier: ~2h/day)

transcribeVoice.description: Automatically transcribe incoming voice messages (requires groqApiKey)
